title: Cuneiform Tablet #0400: Middle Babylonian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
